steps: 1. The question asks for units to measure the area of a bedroom floor. 2. Area is measured in square units. 3. Among the options: A) Metres (m) is for length, not area. B) Square metres (m²) is the metric unit for area. C) Cubic metres (m³) is for volume. D) Kilograms (kg) is for mass. E) Litres (l) is for capacity (volume). 4. Therefore, only square metres (m²) is correct for measuring area.
